characteristics.$text: Each time this model Advances, do not make an Advance roll for it. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of this model. In addition this model can charge in a turn in which it made an advance move.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a transport capacity of 11 Drukhari Infantry models. Each Grotesque model takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can Fly.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While a friendly HAEMONCULUS COVEN unit is within 6", that unit has an 5+ Invulnerable Save.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: While this model has 1-6 wounds remaining, each time it makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: This model has a transport capacity of 19 Drukhari Infantry models. Each Grotesque model takes up the space of 3 models. This model cannot transport models that can Fly.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When this unit fails a Battle-shock test you gain 1 Pain token.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When this unit needs to do a Battle-shock test you can decide to pass or the fail the test automatically - no roll required.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text:
This unit can lead the following units:
■Slavers
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When an enemy unit fails a battle-shock test within 6" of this unit, the enemy units suffers D3 Mortal wounds. If this causes the enemy unit to loose a model, then this model is considered to be captured by the slavers and it generates 1 Pain token in addition to the failed battle-shock test.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: When this unit finishes a charge move, one unit within engagement range of the Duneskuttler must do a battle-shock test.
characteristics.name: Description

characteristics.$text: As long the unit is within 3" to any other friendly infantry unit, this unit has the Lone operative ability.
